counters.description: bard can really shut him down by ulting him, or his target.
her ult makes it hard to lock her down with either your ult or your q
super hard for bard to shut her down very slippery champ esp when in her w ability.

bard only has 500 range on his aa range, where aphelios starts with his green weapon aka the 650 range weapon (even without the sniper he still outranges you with 550 range). so bard won't be able to poke/engage easily on aphelios before lvl 6, however, at lvl 6 he is quite an easy target to ult as he has no dashes/blinks. but i would recommend that you only ult in situations where your 1 champion up as aphelios is one of the few champs that can deal enough damage to burst everyone down.

playing against blitz can be super tough if you get hooked you will die unless u have flash up, you do however out roam him and outscale him so just hang in there and play safe and wait for jungle to help you guys out.

she has 650 range so she outranges you by a lot, so laning phase might be super hard for you, however she is easy to hit with ult since every cait main tries to use their e ability out of it, and its legit so slow so they never get out, so wait for your lvl 6 and just keep ulting her.
you can't really run from her and you can't portal out of her ult so have an eye on her and try to lock her down with your ult and q combo, she is not to be ignored in team fights!

playing against cassiopia can be super tricky as her purple glue will prevent you from portaling out of a fight so be super careful getting stuck in that, besides that when you ult her, expect her to ult right out of your ult, so keep a distance and your back turned at all times!
if you get hooked in by his e it's pretty much over for you, try to play around your portal against him and get some good stuns in, miss and you're dead.

as said draven is very aggressive and is often played with an all in support to make a kill lane, bard is very weak against an all-in especially early game where bard doesn't have a lot of tools to counter it nor survive it, so play safe and wait for your jungler to do stuff!

ekko is a dumb champ you basicly have to kill twice because of his broken ult, try to cc chain and burst him to death before he can ult and gain all his hp back, besides that try to get vision around every corner, as he will often try to jump your backline with a properly placed w.
get as many pinks as you can around your carries often place them in lane if you're sieging so she can't come from behind, but gl eve is broken and there is not much you can do...

ezreal is one of those champs that won't be too deadly for bard during the laning phase but you won't be able to realy have any kill pressure on the champ as long as he holds his e for your q/r. be patient and hold them for his e just run up and auto him until he hopefully e´s. ez doesn't get fully online before 3 items, try to get a big enough lead to win before that!

her w is a direct counter to both your q and your ult so be careful of how you use your spells, besides that you need to help your top to get a lead over fiora or she will split push till she wins the game.
pray that he sucks and try your best to get an ult on him whenever his dash is down!
fear his ganks try to stun him on walls when he uses his e to charge in, if you see him ult try to react with ulting the target he is about to ult.
it's your job against irelia to try and slow her down, meaning ult her stunlock her, not to kill her but to make sure your team has time to deal with everyone else before she joins up.
janna outranges you so the laning phase is super hard, she is also quite quick so u need to try and auto her before u can hit your q´s or ults.
for the same reason, bard is good with him, is also the same reason he is a big threat to bard and his comp.

super hard to deal with during the laning phase as she just flat out range u and u should never be able to hit much stuff on her until you hit lvl 6, when you get your ult though is the moment u can start setting your team up, as she has no dashes/blinks or whatever.

she does more dmg than you, and scales just as well as you or even better depending on her team comp. make sure to play around cd and vision and wait for ur lvl 6 for hard engages, she can't escape it without flashing it, make sure to hit stun after ult to 100-0 her so she doesn't get a chance to e and r as it will buy a lot of time and often you will lose the fight if that happens.

how hard the matchup is really dependant on your experience playing against maokai, maokai is listed as a champ great into bard since he has way better objective control than bard has, and his laning phase is a tad better, but there is ways to counter him. bait out his w and quickly enter the portal to take him with you into ur turret, and then quickly stun, he will either die or be forced to flash.

she has a way better laning phase than you, and she scales just as well as you do or even better into teamfights, her q range is further than your q and auto range. try to punish her when she pokes your adc, never step up when her spells are ready, wait for the to go on cd.

synergies.description: requires a pro on vayne pretty much. both she and bard have low range which is a nightmare during laning phase. synergy between the champions is the stun onto walls from both parts.
having both a bard and an alistar on your team means that you will have a lot of cc but no damage, plus at least 1 losing lane.
amumu weakness can be that he has a hard time to gank lanes, playing with a bard kinda fixes that as bard can help him gank via portals, he can also set up wombo combos with his ult into amumu ult.

bard suffers from short-range, so it's important to have a lane partner with a long auto attack range/spell range. this makes it so they won't get bullied during the laning phase plus it's easier for bard to roam when the adc can safely farm.
ashe has a 600 range so she pairs well with bard, she also brings slows to the fights making it easier to both hit your q and ult and also just getting into auto attack range.
your both support champs so one of you is trolling stop it silly.
you guys don't really synergise well together however it’s an apc which means he can push in quickly and you can roam easily and make plays around the map.
your both supports stop trolling you have nothing to do with him.

caitlyn is probably the best adc in this current meta and works really well with bard. her traps are set up easily by your stun and ultimate. she has a safe lane for you to roam, which is essential for bard.

draven wants to be very aggressive during laning phase, bard wants to get out of laning phase asap meaning he wants boots so he can roam away from botlane meaning draven will never be able to really utilize his passive and therefore he will automatically fall behind and is such a bad pick with bard.

ezreal and you don't really do much for each other but he is an adc that can fend for himself and peel himself so you don't have to be afraid to leave him when you roam so that's great, if he gets to 3 items then he is truly broken.
he is between 4 and 5, as he can almost do the same as caitlyn, throughout the lane, but is more vulnerable than her during the laning phase.
after getting a lot of good buffs jinx is back in the meta, long-range and quite safe with her traps. and scales amazingly into the game, u love to see her as your adc.
kai'sa much like bard is a low range adc, which makes it super easy to get outranged and outpoked in the laning phase. if you see someone pick bard, never pick kai'sa!

bard isn't the best support for kog but he isn't the worst either, your e and w are great to peel for kog and kog offers a lot of early pressure bard has a hard time to push out alone, you can be aggressive when his w is rdy, and passive when its on cd.
leona can't be played as a solo laner, if you get leona and a bard on your team dodge save your lp!
lulu is a great mid and top laner currently, she doesn't have the best setup for roams though so you can't really gank her lane without having your jungler there.

maokai is not great for solo lanes currently, we ain't too fond to see him on our team its not an insta loss but it's a hard game, he does give good objective control, but that's pretty much the only thing he offers in the current patch.

morg can only be played as sup and jungle, and her jungle has been nerfed a lot, so she isn't that great of a pick currently. she does have some synergies with bard if she doesn't fall too behind as they can cc lock a target for a year, but that's about it.
if you have bard and nami on your team then you should probably look to dodge, save yourself.

nautilus can be played as support or jungle, but his jungle is quite weak so i wouldn't advise playing this with bard. your team will lack dmg as both champs can only set up kills but never finish them on their own.
pyke can be played as a midlaner, but it's not very strong, and doesn't offer a lot of synergy with bard. dodge if you get a pyke and a bard on your team.

kalista isn't the best, nor the worst. her range is average, meaning you will have a hard time getting prio in lane, so try to get control over the brushes to counter that. at lvl 6 her ult synergises very well with your q as you can stunlock for quite a while, your e will also work really well at peeling her away from dive champs

karma is in a great spot currently, he is safe and scales really well with a lot of early game dmg, basically everything bard likes, karma can be played as both top or mid and both lanes are good to roam to for bard as karma has great set up with her w.
requires a pro on vayne pretty much. both she and bard have low range which is a nightmare during laning phase. synergy between the champions is the stun onto walls from both parts.
having both a bard and an alistar on your team means that you will have a lot of cc but no damage, plus at least 1 losing lane.
amumu weakness can be that he has a hard time to gank lanes, playing with a bard kinda fixes that as bard can help him gank via portals, he can also set up wombo combos with his ult into amumu ult.
